extra.reason: Implemented X API-primary ingestion with optional xui fallback, tests, and documentation updates.
Implemented factor registry/storage foundation with point-in-time observations, tests, and thermo review fixes

Implemented curated macro factor catalog and FRED/BLS/BEA/Treasury/Fed providers with idempotent PIT refresh semantics; thermo review fixed deterministic availability timestamps, validation-before-write, and latest-date selection

Implemented EIA and Census semiconductor supply-chain factor catalog and providers with configured API-key support, provider rate limiting, monthly PIT availability, missing/revised observation handling, tests, and thermo review cleanup

Implemented factor regime classification and point-in-time factor joins for ranking, API explanation payloads, and backtest replay; thermo review fixed typed boundaries, parallel PIT context lookup, and dependency wiring

Addressed thermo review findings: safe fetched-at PIT availability, post-rank factor enrichment, batched regime joins, derived theme relevance tags, and factors refresh CLI entrypoint with regression tests
